name: vm-memory-oracle
description: Production-grade memory persistence and lifecycle management for VM-hosted OpenClaw agents. 4-layer architecture with knowledge graph, activation/decay, nightly consolidation, and health monitoring. Fully local — no network, no credentials, no sudo.
author: ssharif

init.description: Initialize the memory directory structure and default files

summarize.description: Summarize today's session logs into a daily summary file

consolidate.description: Run the full nightly consolidation pipeline: decay, index, prune, reconcile, clean

health-check.description: Run a health check and write results to health.json

quality-probe.description: Test recall accuracy against canary facts

install-cron.description: Register cron jobs for automated memory lifecycle management
